New QB64 Program.description: Creates a standard boilerplate for a new QB64 program.

New Classic QBasic Program.description: Creates a classic QBasic program template.

For...Next Loop with Step.description: Creates a For...Next loop with a custom Step.

For...Next (Reverse).description: Creates a reverse For...Next loop (counting down).

Select Case (Range).description: Creates a Select Case with range and comparison.

Do...Loop While.description: Creates a Do...Loop While block (checks condition at the end).

Do...Loop Until.description: Creates a Do...Loop Until block (checks condition at the end).

Do While...Loop.description: Creates a Do While...Loop block (checks condition at the start).

Do Until...Loop.description: Creates a Do Until...Loop block (checks condition at the start).

Sub Procedure (No Params).description: Creates a Sub procedure without parameters.

Data and Read Loop.description: Creates a DATA block and a loop to READ from it.

Print Statement.description: Prints a string to the screen.

Line Input Statement.description: Gets a full line of text input from the user.

Locate.description: Moves the text cursor to a specified position.

Color.description: Sets text foreground and background colors.

Open File for Input.description: Opens a file for reading with FREEFILE.

Open File for Output.description: Opens a file for writing with FREEFILE.

Open File for Append.description: Opens a file for appending with FREEFILE.

Open File for Binary.description: Opens a file for binary access.

Read from File Loop.description: A complete loop for reading a text file line by line.

Set Screen Mode.description: Sets the screen mode (QB64 and classic modes).

QB64 Screen Setup.description: Complete QB64 screen setup with title and centering.

Draw Line.description: Draws a line on the screen.

Draw Box.description: Draws a box on the screen.

Draw Filled Box.description: Draws a filled box on the screen.

Draw Circle.description: Draws a circle on the screen.

Draw Filled Circle.description: Draws a filled circle using a loop.

Sound.description: Produces a sound of a certain frequency and duration.

body: PLAY "${1:L4 C D E F G A B}"
Play Music String.description: Plays music using a string of commands.

On Error Goto.description: Creates a basic error handling routine.

Load and Display Image.description: Loads and displays an image using QB64 commands.

body: IF _KEYHIT = 27 THEN running = 0 ' ESC to exit
Game Loop.description: Creates a standard game loop structure.

Keyboard Input Check.description: Creates a keyboard input handler structure.

body: DIM mx AS INTEGER, my AS INTEGER, mb AS INTEGER
' Left mouse button clicked at mx, my

Random Number.description: Generates a random number within a range.

Swap Variables.description: Swaps the values of two variables.

QB64 Delay.description: QB64: Delays for specified seconds (can use decimals).

QB64 Limit FPS.description: QB64: Limits program to specified FPS.

QB64 RGB Color.description: QB64: Creates a 32-bit RGB color value.

QB64 RGBA Color.description: QB64: Creates a 32-bit RGBA color value with alpha.

QB64 Print at Position.description: QB64: Prints text at pixel coordinates.

QB64 Load Sound.description: QB64: Loads and plays a sound file.

QB64 Font Loading.description: QB64: Loads and sets a TrueType font.

Double Buffer Setup.description: Sets up double buffering for smooth graphics.

Metacommand Console.description: Enables the console window in QB64.

Degrees to Radians.description: Creates a function to convert degrees to radians.

Radians to Degrees.description: Creates a function to convert radians to degrees.

body: FUNCTION Clamp# (value AS DOUBLE, minVal AS DOUBLE, maxVal AS DOUBLE)
FUNCTION Lerp# (a AS DOUBLE, b AS DOUBLE, t AS DOUBLE)
FUNCTION Distance2D# (x1 AS DOUBLE, y1 AS DOUBLE, x2 AS DOUBLE, y2 AS DOUBLE)
DIM i AS INTEGER, j AS INTEGER
Sort Array (Bubble Sort).description: Creates a bubble sort subroutine for arrays.

String - Left Substring.description: Returns the leftmost characters of a string.

String - Right Substring.description: Returns the rightmost characters of a string.

String - Middle Substring.description: Returns a substring from the middle.

String - Trim.description: Removes leading and trailing spaces from a string.

String - Find Position.description: Finds the position of a substring within a string.

Math - Power / Exponent.description: Raises a number to a power.

System - Read Timer.description: Returns the number of seconds elapsed since midnight.

System - Call External Program.description: Executes an external command or program.

Array - Find Upper Bound.description: Returns the highest available index for a given array.

Array - Find Lower Bound.description: Returns the lowest available index for a given array.
